title: OREGON HEALTH PLAN - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OREGON HEALTH PLAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Health Plan (OHP) is Oregon's Medicaid program. Provides health care coverage for all low-income Oregonians who meet eligibility requirements. Medicaid members may be able to access free rides for visits to medical appointments or reimbursement if they drive themselves. 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Eligibility requirements vary: OHP -For individuals with a household income at or below 138% federal poverty level (FPL). -Age 19 and under with a family household income at or below 305% FPL. -As of July 1, 2023, immigration and citizenship status no longer affects whether someone qualifies for full OHP. OHP Plus Supplemental (Prenatal) -Pregnant individuals, age 21 and older, with a household income at or below 190% FPL. Expected children count as members of the household, as they do in all OHP FPL calculations. OHP Bridge -Adults with income between 138%-200% FPL Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (800) 699-9075 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers OHP Customer Service (800) 699-9075 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit the website for information and to apply for the Oregon Health Plan. Website also lists in-person assistors (Navigators) to help apply for coverage. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish. Online applications available in English, Spanish, Russian, Chinese, Vietnamese. AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Medicaid Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - OHA OMBUDS PROGRAM FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT SPECIALTY MEDICINE - OREGON VETERAN DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
